# AskMykonos.ai

> A free, live AI travel guide for Mykonos, Greece. Ask in plain language — in English,
> Greek, or your own language — about beaches, sunsets, boat trips, food, transfers and
> day plans, and get a few relevant suggestions with the details that matter, instead of
> ten browser tabs. No app, no sign-up, no ads.

AskMykonos.ai is an independent visitor guide and is not an official tourism authority.
It is part of the "ASK AI Travel Network" (sibling site: AskSantorini.ai). AI-generated
answers may be incomplete or outdated; schedules, prices, availability and safety-sensitive
details should be verified with the relevant provider.

## Core pages

- [Home / live AI chat](https://askmykonos.ai/): Ask the island anything; starter questions
  for sunsets, beaches, Delos, windy days, dinner and family plans.
- [Mykonos Travel FAQ (English)](https://askmykonos.ai/faq.html): Quick answers on sunsets,
  windy-day plans, beaches, getting around and whether you need a car.
- [Mykonos Travel FAQ (Greek)](https://askmykonos.ai/faq-el.html): Οι ίδιες συχνές
  ερωτήσεις για τη Μύκονο στα ελληνικά.

## Common questions answered

- Where is the best sunset spot? Little Venice and the windmills (Kato Mili) are the classic
  and busiest; Agios Ioannis is calmer; Armenistis Lighthouse is quieter with transport;
  a sunset boat cruise is a premium option when conditions allow.
- What to do on a windy day? Mykonos gets the meltemi wind — head inland to Chora and Ano
  Mera, wine tastings, long lunches and museums; more southern beaches are better protected.
- Best family beaches? Ornos and Platis Gialos are the most practical; Agios Ioannis for a
  quieter mood, depending on where you stay and the day's wind.
- Getting around / do I need a car? Buses connect Chora with the main beaches and Ano Mera;
  taxis are limited (book transfers ahead in peak season); ATV or car helps for remote
  beaches like Fokos. A car is optional for simple, bus-friendly itineraries.

## Concierge

- [Concierge services](https://askmykonos.ai/#concierge): Ask about photographers, wedding
  and ceremony planners, flowers and setups, and premium transfers with local context.

## Legal & contact

- [Privacy note](https://askmykonos.ai/privacy-policy.html): Demonstration site — no data
  collection; the chat is a scripted demo that runs entirely in the browser.
- [Contact](mailto:info@asksantorini.ai): Questions about this demo or the domain.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/asksantoriniai/): Updates.
